body_txt: A Sub-Trope of No Name Given in which a character is not just a "victim" of Only One Name , but is only known by his job title or some other descriptive moniker, or an obscure or odd word that functions as an unusual nickname. Different from Only Known by Their Nickname , in that it is actually describing what they do. If the character initiates it, it's Spell My Name with a "The" . May be the result of a Nameless Narrative or Featureless Protagonist . For parents, see Unnamed Parent . Related to They Call Him "Sword" and Person with the Clothing . Compare/contrast Race-Name Basis when race is used for this and the character may or may not have a name and A Dog Named "Dog" . When it's not just a moniker but their actual name, then you might say that His Name Really Is "Barkeep" . May have a Given Name Reveal at some point.
